predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual average employees > 50).

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual net turnover excluding VAT > 11,250,000 euro).

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (balance sheet total > 6,000,000 euro).

predicates.name: more_than_one_small_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_small_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the last closed financial year for the company on the balance sheet date.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company based on the last closed financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding value added tax of the company in the financial year, in euro.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euro.
